tasks.subject: Task 1: Database layer — migration + queries + sqlc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the attendances table + night/attendee SQL queries, then generate the Go data layer.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/migrations/0003_attendances.sql
- Create: backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql
- Generated: backend/internal/db/nights.sql.go, models.go

**Verify:** cd backend && just sqlc && just build && just test-integration

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/migrations/0003_attendances.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/nights.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just sqlc && just build && just test-integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["attendances table + unique index", "sqlc generates the 5 methods", "build + existing integration tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend pure helpers + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure validation + DTO-mapping helpers for nights, unit-tested with no mocks.

**Files:**
- Create: backend/nights.go (pure helpers only)
- Create: backend/nights_test.go

**Verify:** cd backend && go test -run '^TestNight|^TestPresentIDs|^TestToNightResponse' ./... && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/nights_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test -run '^TestNight|^TestPresentIDs|^TestToNightResponse' ./... && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["validation + dedupe", "non-nil empty present set", "DTO mapping"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend handlers + routing + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Five HTTP handlers + nightStore, wire routes in main.go, testcontainers integration tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/nights.go (append handlers + nightStore)
- Create: backend/nights_integration_test.go
- Modify: backend/main.go (register 5 routes)

**Verify:** cd backend && just check && just test-integration

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/nights.go", "backend/nights_integration_test.go", "backend/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check && just test-integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5 endpoints wired", "error codes 400/404/422", "guest + absent-core excluded from order"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Mobile nights API client + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lib/nights.ts (fetch + validation, reusing parseTurn) with unit + real-local-server integration tests.

**Files:**
- Create: mobile/lib/nights.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/nights.test.ts
- Create: mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts lib/nights.integration.test.ts && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nights.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.test.ts", "mobile/lib/nights.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nights.test.ts lib/nights.integration.test.ts && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseNight validation", "correct method/path/body", "throws on non-2xx"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile night screen + navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** expo-router night screen: create night, toggle attendees (reusing fetchMembers), show pick order; register route + link from turn screen.

**Files:**
- Create: mobile/app/night.tsx
- Modify: mobile/app/_layout.tsx (register night route)
- Modify: mobile/app/index.tsx (link to /night)

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx", "mobile/app/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["attendee toggles", "pick order updates", "guests separated from order", "lint+typecheck+test green"]}
```
